bird.name: 小草原松鸡
bird.summary: 小草原松鸡（台湾作小草原榛雞）（学名：Tympanuchus pallidicinctus），是鸡形目雉科的一种鸟类。 小草原松鸡体重约745.82克，翼长约205毫米，嘴峰长约24.7毫米，喙宽度约9.6毫米，喙厚度约10毫米，跗蹠长约40.9毫米，尾长约138毫米。小草原松…

relations.subject: 小草原松鸡
relations.evidence: Considered "vulnerable" by the IUCN due to its restricted and patchy range, it is vulnerable to habitat destruction, due to a combination of droughts, oil contamination, woody plant encroachment,{{Cite journal |last1=Lautenbach |first1=Joseph M
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 小草原松鸡
relations.evidence: Considered "vulnerable" by the IUCN due to its restricted and patchy range, it is vulnerable to habitat destruction, due to a combination of droughts, oil contamination, woody plant encroachment,{{Cite journal |last1=Lautenbach |first1=Joseph M
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: 小草原松鸡
relations.evidence: The lesser prairie-chicken's habitat has been reduced by 85%, and their population has declined by about 97% since 1800, in part due to unrestricted hunting.{{Cite book |last=Barber |first=Lynn E
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
